item.title: THKÜ RSS
item.description: Checking updates on announcement pages can get really annoying, especially if there are multiple of them and you have to check them periodically in order not to miss time-critical ones. To get updates from the university I(how selfish) study at (THKÜ), I started writing THKÜ RSS generator. Basically it fetches HTML, parses it, creates XML feeds for each annoucement site (as I mentioned there are multiple announcement sites). how to get it?
